message.content:
Explore the test server Kubernetes configuration for the exams project. Check the following paths:

1. /home/username/Deployments/test/kubernetes/ - look for any "exam" related directories
2. Also check D:/project/pt-gitlab/ for any kubernetes or deployment related directories

Since this is Windows, also check:
- C:/Users/luobeilin/ for any Deployments directory
- Look in the exams project itself for any k8s, kubernetes, deploy directories

Also check the exams project at D:\project\pt-gitlab\exams for:
- Any existing .gitlab-ci.yml 
- Any existing Dockerfile
- Any kubernetes/ or k8s/ or deploy/ directories within the project

List all files found with their contents if they are configuration files.
